theme.primary_archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (with Archetype 1 Organic Indian color accents)
theme.rationale: High-trust, premium enterprise feel like Stripe/Vercel, but deeply rooted in an Indian identity through color psychology (Saffron, Indigo, Emerald) rather than generic tech blue. Avoids purple/teal.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. The Swiss Grid approach. Tension through asymmetry on landing, dense functional grids for dashboard.

components.buttons: Flat, no gradient. Hard edges or slight radius (rounded-md). High contrast text. Strict hover transitions.
components.cards: Flat background matching surface, 1px border, subtle shadow-sm. Hover: translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-md.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Minimal, 1px border. Focus ring: 2px solid primary color.
components.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky top navigation. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-[#0B0D17]/80 (dark) with 1px bottom border.
components.compliance_calendar: Dense data view. Color-coded badges (Green/Yellow/Red) in a strictly aligned grid.
components.health_score_gauge: SVG-based radial progress. High-contrast colors depending on score tier.
components.disclaimer_banner: Top of page. Archetype 4 High-contrast yellow/black or monochrome to signify 'Demo Mode'.
components.ai_copilot: Floating bottom-right or collapsible right-sidebar. Chat bubbles must avoid gradients; use solid surface colors with sharp corners on the origin side.

motion.list_stagger: framer-motion staggerChildren 0.1s. Entrance: opacity 0, y 10 -> opacity 1, y 0.
motion.page_transition: Fade in, subtle scale-up (0.98 -> 1.0) on mount.

hero.description: Indian founders collaborating in a modern office setup. Use for hero section or 'About Us' to establish trust.
Confident founder working at a desk. Good for the MVP flow intro.

dashboard_placeholders.description: Abstract futuristic data UI. Use for the 'AI Copilot' visual or data intelligence engine background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Vite + React + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
Strictly follow the color palette. Avoid default Tailwind blues/purples.
Implement the UI using Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Inject these via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Landing page MUST have 'Explore Demo' button prominently displayed with data-testid.
Build three distinct onboarding flows: Idea (No login), MVP, Registered Business.
Registered business flow must navigate to the Dashboard pre-populated with simulated data.
Add a persistent 'Demo Mode' disclaimer banner at the top of the dashboard.
Dashboard layout MUST have a left sidebar navigation and a main content area.
Use a 'Control Room Grid' for the compliance dashboard and health score.
Implement a Dark/Light mode toggle in the header/sidebar.
Ensure EVERY button, input, and clickable card has a `data-testid` attribute.
DO NOT use placeholder text or generic grey boxes for images. Use the provided media URLs.
